strategy.name: v90_meta_confidence
strategy.note: Two-sided meta-labeler: causal features -> XGBoost LONG/SHORT heads on triple-barrier labels (purged K-fold) -> isotonic-calibrated confidence -> BUY/SELL/FLAT. Raw score drives decision; calibrated probability is the honest confidence. Params/labels frozen before OOS; artifacts from tools/train_v90_meta_confidence.py.
